prompt: I'm building a login screen in nornspun-client and my LaunchedEffect that calls viewModel.loadProfile() keeps firing every time the user types into the password field. It's spamming our API. What am I doing wrong and how do I fix it?

assertions.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
